covered_sentences: One day around noon, something happened that changed my life on the island.
I found the print of man's naked foot on the beach.
I stood and look at the footprint in amazement.
I looked around me but saw nothing.
I went to higher ground and looked again but it was the same, I saw no one and no other footprint except that one, I was terrified and went home to hide myself.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Three-panel horizontal strip composition; left panel: camera at medium-wide, slightly elevated, looking down the beach at the protagonist walking along the sand, carefree posture under midday sun; center panel: camera low angle, close-in, positioned behind and to the right of the protagonist who has stopped and is staring down at a single bare footprint in the sand — protagonist occupies left two-thirds, the footprint in the sand occupies the center-right; right panel: camera further back, wide shot from a low hillside vantage, protagonist seen as a small figure atop a small rise, hand shading his eyes, scanning the horizon — beach and sea spread below him, no other person visible anywhere.

Left panel: protagonist walks along the beach in midday light, posture relaxed, looking ahead; right footprint visible in the sand at the lower frame just ahead of him. Center panel: protagonist frozen mid-step, staring down at a single large bare human footprint in the damp sand; body tense, eyes wide in shock; no other footprint visible in either direction; expression of stunned disbelief. Right panel: protagonist stands atop a low rocky rise, hand raised to shade his eyes, scanning left and right — vast empty beach and sea visible around him, no other human figure anywhere; then shown heading back downhill, posture urgent and frightened.

Left panel scene: island beach (S7), midday bright tropical sunlight, golden sand, blue sea at right, rocky reef at left edge, broken ship wreck faintly visible far offshore. Center panel: same beach, focus on a patch of damp sand at water's edge, the single bare footprint clearly impressed; sunlight sharp overhead. Right panel: small rocky rise at the island beach edge, open panorama of the empty beach and sea below, bright midday sky.

All three panels: harsh midday tropical sun, high contrast, bleached sand whites and deep blue sea; center panel: tension heightened with slightly cooler, more overexposed light; right panel: wide open sky emphasizing isolation.

Protagonist (island castaway version): brown short straight hair, short beard, goatskin wide-brimmed hat, goatskin short jacket, goatskin trousers, leather-strap sandals; left panel — protagonist full figure at roughly two-thirds panel height, relaxed walking posture; center panel — protagonist's figure from mid-thigh upward fills left two-thirds of panel, the footprint in sand occupies about one-quarter of panel area at center-right; right panel — protagonist as a small figure, roughly one-third panel height, atop the rise, sea horizon visible behind him. The bare human footprint in the sand: single foot impression, slightly larger than the protagonist's sandal footprint for dramatic scale effect.

STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Character appearance, clothing details, and scene elements strictly follow reference images; no self-added or modified details; character proportions consistent throughout. No Chinese text in image; no watermark; no extra figures; proportions natural; spatial relationships clear. White straight dividing lines between panels, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gaps; no outer border. Scene fingerprint: golden sandy beach + blue sea with distant wrecked ship outline + rocky reef at beach edge, positions and forms unchanged. Protagonist (island version): hair color must not change, goatskin jacket must not be replaced, wide-brimmed hat must remain, short beard must not be removed. Proportion anchors: left panel — protagonist full figure, hat top at two-thirds panel height; center panel — the footprint impression occupies roughly one-quarter panel area, protagonist stands to its left filling remaining space; right panel — protagonist figure about one-third panel height on the rise, beach and sea filling the rest. No floating text, no caption, no label text. 【情绪标记】强度：强，类型：恐惧，推荐视觉手段：center panel — eyes wide, body frozen mid-step, speed lines radiating from the footprint; right panel — hunched urgent posture heading downhill, stark empty landscape emphasizes terror.

covered_sentences: At first I thought it must have been the footprint of the devil, for how could a human being have come to this place?
I then began to think the print was left by savages from the mainland.
They must have come in canoes and left again.
I was very thankful that they had not seen my boat.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split composition, 1:1 ratio; left panel: camera at eye level, from slightly right of the protagonist, medium shot, protagonist inside the tent shelter huddled near the back wall, arms wrapped around knees, frightened expression, imagining the devil; thought-bubble shows a simple devil-horns silhouette with a question mark; right panel: camera at eye level from slightly left, medium shot, same protagonist now sitting upright, expression shifting to worried but analytical thought, imagining canoes approaching from the mainland; thought-bubble shows simplified canoe outline approaching from left with arrow direction.

Left panel: protagonist crouches in fear at the back of the tent, hugging knees, eyes wide, looking toward the tent entrance; thought-bubble above shows devil-horns simple sketch with a question mark. Right panel: protagonist sits slightly more upright, brow furrowed in thought rather than panic, arms now resting on knees; thought-bubble above shows a simple canoe outline with an arrow pointing away (departing), and a small boat-sketch in the lower bubble with a shielding hand icon over it ("thankful they didn't see my boat").

Left panel scene: inside tent shelter camp (S11), night or early evening light, dim filtered light through tent canvas, earthen floor, wooden crate at left edge. Right panel scene: same tent interior, slightly calmer ambient light, protagonist repositioned toward the tent opening side.

Left panel: cool dark blue-gray tones, heavy shadow, fearful atmosphere; right panel: slightly warmer tone, still dim but a hint of amber candlelight or firelight at the tent opening edge, suggesting a shift from panic to worried calculation.

Protagonist (island castaway version): brown short straight hair, short beard, goatskin jacket worn loosely, wide-brimmed hat off and lying beside him on the floor, goatskin trousers, leather-strap sandals; left panel — protagonist crouched, figure fills roughly two-thirds of panel height; right panel — protagonist seated upright, figure at roughly two-thirds panel height; crate beside him at roughly his shoulder height while seated.

covered_sentences: How strange is the life of a man!
Today we desire what tomorrow we fear.
For years I had desired human society.
Now I was terrified at the thought that another human being had set his foot upon the island.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Single-panel composition, left-right split with a central dividing cloud-bubble device; main panel shows protagonist standing inside the tent entrance, looking out; left side of the main image contains a thought-cloud with a past memory (protagonist earlier on the beach looking hopefully toward sea with a figure of another human approaching warmly); right side of the main image shows protagonist's frightened present-day face recoiling from the thought.

Main composition: protagonist stands at the tent entrance, one hand gripping the tent-flap edge, body half-turned inward in fright; his expression is torn — longing and terror simultaneously; a large cloud thought-bubble extends from above his head, split diagonally: left half of the cloud shows a past-version of the protagonist on the beach gazing hopefully toward an approaching friendly silhouette (the desired human companion); right half of the same cloud shows the present moment — a lone bare footprint on the beach with the protagonist recoiling from it.

Scene: tent shelter camp interior, evening dim light, tent flap partially open at right, earthen floor, wooden crate at left, cliff-wall visible at rear.

Dim warm amber light at the tent opening, cool shadows inside; the cloud-bubble interior: left (past-memory) half in warm nostalgic soft tones; right (present-fear) half in cold sharp light — vivid contrast.

Protagonist (island castaway version): brown short straight hair, short beard, goatskin jacket, goatskin wide-brimmed hat on head, goatskin trousers, leather-strap sandals; protagonist's full figure occupies center frame, roughly two-thirds panel height; tent entrance edge at his shoulder level when standing near the flap; the thought-cloud occupies approximately the upper-right third of the total panel.

Proportion anchors: protagonist full figure about two-thirds panel height; tent flap opening edge at shoulder level; thought-cloud occupies upper third of panel. No floating text, no caption, no label text.

covered_sentences: I thought again of the words in the Bible, call upon me in the day of trouble and I will deliver you, and you will praise me I pray to god to deliver me from danger from danger.
Afterwards I opened my Bible and I read.
Wait on the lord and be of good courage, and he shall strengthen your heart.
Although these words comforted me, I was still afraid.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split composition, 2:1 ratio, right panel larger; left panel: camera close-in from slightly above, looking down at the protagonist's hands holding an open Bible on his knees, finger tracing a line of text, small lit candle stub visible beside the book; right panel: camera at medium distance, slightly elevated, protagonist seated by candlelight inside the tent, expression showing fragile, uncertain comfort — eyes soft but brow still furrowed with residual fear.

Left panel: close-up of the protagonist's hands — index finger resting on an open page of a worn leather Bible, the pages slightly yellowed; a candle stub burns on the wooden crate beside his knee, casting warm light on the page; no text shown on the Bible pages. Right panel: protagonist's face and upper torso in medium-close shot, soft candlelight lighting his features from the lower-left, expression showing a tentative calm layered over lingering anxiety; hands still holding the Bible just below frame; a small tear-track or downcast eyelid hints at unresolved fear despite comfort.

Left panel scene: inside tent shelter (S11), nighttime, only candlelight, earthen floor, wooden crate surface visible as a table, canvas walls around. Right panel scene: same tent interior, same candlelight ambiance, tent canvas wall behind protagonist, a few tools or objects dimly visible on the crate.

Both panels: deep nighttime darkness with warm golden candlelight, strong chiaroscuro effect, shadows heavy around the edges.

Right panel protagonist (island castaway version): brown short straight hair, short beard, goatskin jacket, wide-brimmed hat off and set aside, goatskin trousers; right panel — protagonist's head and shoulders fill roughly upper two-thirds of the panel, candlelight illuminating the right side of his face; left panel — protagonist's hands fill roughly three-quarters of the panel width, Bible page occupies lower half, candle flame at upper-right edge.
